name: Rice Tomato Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the butter in a heavy saucepan.
2. Add the onion, garlic, green pepper, and rice to the saucepan.
3. Cook, stirring until the ingredients are lightly browned.
4. Reserve half of the tomato sauce.
5. Add the remaining tomato sauce to the rice mixture.
6. Stir in the boiling water and salt and pepper to taste.
7. Simmer, covered, until all liquid has been absorbed.
8. Transfer the casserole mix to a greased one-quart baking dish.
9. Layer with half of the rice, olives, and one cup of cheese.
10. Cover with the remaining ingredients: top layer of rice, remaining cheese.
11. Bake in a hot oven (400 degrees F.) until the casserole is hot and browned.
